title: Teab's Doctor WHO Mod 2 Fabric
description: Teab's Doctor WHO Mod is now available on Fabric - Ported using Kilt!
body:
# TEAB'S DOCTOR WHO MOD IS HERE NOW IN FABRIC FORM!
**Special Thanks to the Kilt team for finding out a way to port Forge mods to Fabric - This is how the mod is in Fabric!**

This is the ULTIMATE Minecraft Doctor Who experience! Get ready for loads of adventues, and many more to come!

### If you want to play the Forge/Neo-Forge verion of the mod go to [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/teabs-doctor-who-mod/)! 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3Ps32TegJD4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## FEATURES:
- A fully functional TARDIS, with over a dozen unique interiors, and the ability to travel to any place, any dimension, or any time!
- Blend in using the Chameleon Circuit!
- Set waypoints to never lose your way home!
- Dozens of decoration blocks for customizing your TARDIS!
- New planets to explore!
- A host of terrifying monsters from the show, including multiple variants of Daleks and Cybermen, with many more to come!
- Defeat bosses like the Dalek Emperor to unlock mysterious, and potentially powerful, items!
- Your very own companion in the form of K-9, the Doctor's loyal robot dog!
- Several gadgets, including several versions of the iconic the Sonic Screwdriver, TARDIS Key, Stattenheim Remote, and more!


### MOBS:
- Daleks! (dozens of variants, many have unique attacks and abilities)
- Time War Dalek Emperor Boss
- Cybermen! (over a dozen variants, convert villagers and players)
- K-9 (craftable, tameable)
- Beep The Meep (neutral)
- Robot Mummy
- Ice Warrior
- Zygon (transforms into villagers when in a village)
- Thal (male and female)
- Silurian
- Sea Devil (weak on land, but formidable in the water)
- Hand Mine
- Varga Plant
- Bessie (craftable)
- Slyther
- Slitheen
- Weeping Angel
- Sontaran (Standard and Armored)
- Vashta Nerada
- Silence
- Whispermen
- Wrarth Warriors
- Empty Child
- Empty Villager
- Kerblam! Man
- Autons
- Time Lords
- UNIT Soldiers and Medics (tameable with emeralds)

### BOSSES:
- Time War Dalek Emperor
- Sutekh the Destroyer

### PLANETS:
- Skaro
- The Moon
- Mars
- Trenzalore
- Mondas
- Gallifrey

### SONIC SCREWDRIVER FUNCTIONS:
- Till grass
- Turn sand to glass
- Turn red sand to red stained glass
- Tint/untint glass
- Shatter glass panes
- Activate/deactivate redstone lamps
- Open/close iron doors
- Detonate TNT
- Detonate landmines
- Crack stone bricks
- Turn iron, gold, and copper ore into ingots
- Melt ice
- Carve pumpkins
- Light jack-o-lanterns
- Crack anvils
- Lock chests (break to unlock)
- Disarm trapped chests


### COMMANDS:
- /tdwm resetstructures - Resets all set-location structures in the current dimension
- /tdwm tardis regeneratetardis - Rebuilds your TARDIS interior
- /tdwm tardis destroytardis - Removes your TARDIS exterior
- /tdwm tardis replacetardis - Removes and replaces your TARDIS exterior
- /tdwm setdoorpos - Changes the TARDIS's interior door location to your current coords
- /gamerule KerblamManSpawning true/false - Enables or disables Kerblam! Man spawning

### HANDLES COMMANDS:
- Handles what can you do?
- Handles what is the scariest mob?
- Handles who made this mod?
- Handles are you my mummy?
- Handles who am I?
- Handles take me to my tardis
- Handles summon my tardis
- Handles what is the time?
- Handles say...
- Handles lock/open the tardis
- Handles tell me a joke
- Handles play <MusicDisc>
- Handles how do I get to Gallifrey?


THE WHOLE UNIVERSE AWAITS YOU, SO WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR? GERONIMO!!

**I have permission to move this to Modrinth but do NOT try this with other mods without the creators permission**
